name: Austin Portable Bluetooth Speaker with Deep Bass, Adjustable EQ, Built-in Mic & Compact Design
descriptionHtml:
Product Details

  • Output Power: 10W rich, dynamic sound.
  • Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.3 for seamless pairing.
  • Mounting Type: Tabletop mount for easy placement.
  • Special Feature: Portable and travel-friendly design.
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, 16A, Goraguntepalya, Yeshwanthpur Industrial Suburb, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022

About this Item

  • Powerful Compact Sound: Delivers impressive audio through a 2” full-range driver and dual passive radiators for deep bass.
  • Customizable Audio: Fine-tune your sound with adjustable EQ for bass, mids, and treble via the companion app.
  • Uninterrupted Listening: Stay connected up to 40 feet with stable Bluetooth 5.3 true wireless performance.
  • Hands-Free Functionality: Built-in mic lets you answer calls without breaking your rhythm.

name: Detroit Bluetooth Stereo Speaker – Powerful Sound, Waterproof Design & 20-Hour Playtime
descriptionHtml:
Product Details

  • Output Power: 88W of powerful, room-filling sound.
  • Frequency Response: Crisp highs and deep lows up to 20 kHz.
  • Connectivity: Bluetooth 5.3 for seamless wireless streaming.
  • Audio Output Mode: True stereo sound for immersive listening.
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022

About this Item

  • Powerful Concert-Like Sound: Dual 1” tweeters and dual 3” woofers deliver rich, dynamic audio that feels like a live performance.
  • Rugged & Waterproof: IP67-rated—fully dustproof and waterproof, built to handle any adventure from beach trips to outdoor treks.
  • Extended Playtime: Up to 20 hours of continuous playback keeps your music going day and night.
  • Seamless Wireless Connection: Enjoy strong, stable Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity across all your devices.
  • Portable & Stylish: Compact and travel-ready with a retro-inspired design.

name: Flexus Core 200 3.1.2 Dolby Atmos Soundbar with Built-In Subwoofers & Onkyo Tuning
descriptionHtml:
Hear Every Word. Feel Every Scene. Powered by Onkyo engineering and enhanced with Dolby Atmos, this 3.1.2-channel soundbar delivers cinematic clarity, immersive surround sound, and deep, room-filling bass — without needing an external subwoofer.

About this Item

  • Co-Created Excellence: Developed in collaboration with Onkyo, blending advanced audio engineering and trusted reliability.
  • Immersive 3.1.2-Channel Soundbar: Features advanced acoustics and proprietary sound technology for a complete, cinematic surround experience.
  • Dolby Atmos Integration: Two built-in elevation speakers for multidimensional, room-filling sound.
  • Custom-Tuned Audio & Deep Bass: Four 2.25” ceramic drivers and dual 4” built-in subwoofers for full-bodied bass—no external subwoofer needed.
  • Crystal-Clear Dialog Clarity: Dedicated horn-loaded tweeter ensures crisp, distinct vocals.

Product Details

  • Output Power: 185W of dynamic, high-performance sound.
  • Frequency Response: Deep and rich bass down to 43 Hz.
  • Connectivity: Bluetooth and HDMI-ARC for seamless streaming.
  • Audio Output Mode: Dolby Atmos surround sound.
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022

name: Flexus Sub 100 Wireless Subwoofer for Core Series Soundbars with Deep Bass Output
descriptionHtml:
Product Details

  • Output Power: 80W of deep, impactful bass.
  • Frequency Response: Extends up to 20 kHz for balanced, full-range sound.
  • Connectivity: USB pre-paired dongle for effortless wireless connection.
  • Audio Output Mode: Surround sound for an enhanced home theater experience.

About this Item

  • Exclusive Compatibility: Designed to work seamlessly with Flexus CORE 100 and CORE 200 soundbars for a perfectly synchronized audio experience.

name: Gig XXL Bluetooth Party Speaker with Dual 6.5” Woofers, Mic Input & Dynamic Light Show
descriptionHtml:
Product Details

  • Dimensions: 29 x 27.5 x 55.1 cm sleek and portable build.
  • Connectivity: Bluetooth for seamless wireless streaming.
  • Colour: Classic black for a bold, modern look.
  • Compatible Devices: Works effortlessly with smartphones and more.
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022

About this Item

  • Powerful Audio Output: Room-filling sound with dual 6.5” woofers and dual 2” tweeters for crisp highs and deep bass.
  • Dynamic Light Show & Strobe: Multiple color modes, vibrant light rings, and strobes that sync to your music; Bass Boost for extra impact.
  • Karaoke & Instrument Ready: Includes a karaoke mic, input jack, and 1/4" instrument cable port for guitars, keyboards, and more.
  • Effortless Bluetooth Pairing: Instantly connect and pair two Gig XXLs for true stereo.
  • Long-Lasting Playtime: Up to 8 hours of continuous music on a single charge.

name: Groove XL Portable Bluetooth Speaker with Dual Drivers, Deep Bass & 16.5-Hr Battery Life
descriptionHtml:
Product Details

  • Maximum Output Power: 100 Watts for powerful, dynamic sound.
  • Connectivity: Bluetooth for wireless streaming.
  • Audio Output Mode: Stereo for balanced, immersive playback.
  • Mounting Type: Tabletop mount for stable placement anywhere.
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022

About this Item

  • Legendary Portable Sound: Stream music wirelessly and turn any gathering—beach, bonfire, or backyard—into an instant party.
  • Compact Yet Powerful: Dual 2.5” full-range drivers and dual 3” passive radiators deliver crisp highs and deep bass with 40W peak power.
  • All-Day Battery Life: Up to 16.5 hours of uninterrupted playtime with high-performance lithium-ion battery.
  • Splash-Resistant Design: IPX4-rated protection against splashes, rain, and outdoor elements—perfect for poolside or patio.

name: Klipsch The Fives Matte Black | Powered Bookshelf Speakers with HDMI-ARC, Bluetooth 5 & High-Res 24-Bit Audio – Black
descriptionHtml:
Product Details

  • Speaker Maximum Output Power: 160 Watts
  • Connectivity Technology: HDMI-ARC, Bluetooth 5, optical, RCA, USB, phono
  • Audio Output Mode: Stereo
  • Input Voltage: 240 Volts
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022

About this item

  • Enhanced TV Audio: Immersive, high-definition sound that connects directly to your TV via HDMI-ARC.
  • Acoustic Horn-Loaded Technology: Powerful, room-filling soundstage with superior clarity and detail.
  • Dynamic Bass Equalization: Deep, impactful bass at every volume level.
  • High-Resolution Audio Support: 192kHz/24-bit decoding for crystal-clear, high-fidelity sound.
  • Versatile Connectivity: HDMI-ARC, Bluetooth 5, digital optical, analog RCA, USB, phono preamp, and subwoofer output.

name: Klipsch The One Plus Matte Black | Compact Bluetooth Speaker with 192kHz/24-Bit Audio, Phono Input & Dynamic Bass – Black
descriptionHtml:
Product Details

  • Speaker Maximum Output Power: 100 Watts
  • Connectivity Technology: Bluetooth, Phono input
  • Audio Output Mode: Stereo
  • Mounting Type: Tabletop Mount
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022

About this item

  • Luxury Design: Real wood veneer and tactile switches, blending classic Klipsch heritage with modern technology.
  • Big Sound: Bi-amplified 2.1 stereo system with two 2.25” full-range drivers and a 4.5” high-excursion woofer.
  • Wireless Streaming: Bluetooth 5.3 streaming from up to 40 feet away.
  • Customizable Control: Adjust EQ, save presets, and update firmware via the Klipsch Connect App.
  • Compact & Versatile: 12” W x 6.39” D x 6” H, easy to place anywhere.

descriptionHtml:
